Parth Batra

Gurugram, Haryana hi@fromparth.blog GitHub LinkedIn

Data Scientist with a strong foundation in Mathematics (BITS Pilani MSc) and proven experience developing impactful AI/ML solutions across industries. Skilled at transforming complex data into actionable business intelligence and architecting end-to-end AI/ML systems.

Education

BITS Pilani, Pilani Campus July 2017 – May 2022
M.Sc. (Hons.) Mathematics · B.E. (Hons.) Mechanical Engineering

Experience

"Full Stack" Data Scientist — Procol Sept 2022 – Present
B2B SaaS · $2B+ monthly volume · Gurugram
  • Architected & delivered 7 strategic LLM agents product-wide — IntakeAI, RFX-Gen, Smart-Collator, Spend-Analyst, Smart-Awarding, VendorFinder, and more.
  • Mastered complex 75k+ product taxonomy (2.5k+ classes) with a 93% accuracy unsupervised model.
  • Pioneered in-house vLLM OCR for 3-way matching, cutting third-party API costs by 95%.
  • Ensured platform stability by managing 8+ core Airflow data pipelines.
  • Defined & tracked product adoption metrics; built dashboards informing internal strategy and investor reports.
ML for Demo Attendance Forecasting — Brightchamps Jan 2022 – Jun 2022
Software Engineer Intern · Bangalore
  • Developed a weighted scoring model to forecast demo class attendance from 1500+ daily student leads.
  • Delivered 90% accuracy, enabling targeted teacher assignment to high-intent leads and reducing no-shows.
Financial Flow Forecasting Engine — Genpact Jul 2021 – Dec 2021
AI Engineer Intern · Bangalore
  • Built XGBoost model predicting invoice clearing dates for a global FMCG leader with 12+ engineered features.
  • Achieved test RMSE of 15.38 days, enhancing cash flow forecasting accuracy.
  • Identified actionable customer segments (Best-to-Worst payers) to optimize collection strategies.
Devanagari Digitizer — CSIS, BITS Pilani Aug 2019 – Dec 2019
Academic Project
  • Used computer vision & image processing to segment and extract Devanagari letters from images.
  • Developed a UI to generate training datasets for Sanskrit language letter recognition.
  • Trained a CNN model to recognize segmented letters and produce digitized image output.
Multi-parameter Logistics Route Optimization — Maruti Suzuki May 2019 – Jul 2019
Summer Intern · Gurugram
  • Optimized logistics routes across 2000+ consignees, 324 cities, and 4 vehicle types to cut operational costs.

Leadership & Student Life

Pitching & Autonomous Systems Lead — Team BITS @ Shell Eco-Marathon Asia May 2018 – May 2020
  • Co-led team operations and spearheaded pitching for India's first E-100 fueled vehicle by a college team.
Creative Head — Mathematics Association, BITS Pilani Aug 2018 – May 2019
Design Team — Student Union (SU), BITS Pilani Aug 2019 – May 2020
Campaign Volunteer — Vikalpa Foundation 'Super100' Initiative Jun 2018
  • Led outreach seminars in rural Haryana schools explaining IIT-JEE/NEET pathways for students.

Awards & Recognition

  • Winner, ‘Mechanix’ Event — APOGEE, BITS Pilani Annual Tech Fest, 2018
  • Indian National Mathematics Olympiad (INMO-2015) Qualifier — AIR 14, SR 1
  • Table Tennis — District, State (Haryana), and Zonal (North Zone Clusters) Championships
